summary_en: 200,000 ordinary shares (2.19% of issued shares outstanding) to be cancelled effective 2026-05-28. Post-cancellation issued shares: 8,930,000. Treasury shares post-cancellation: 289,368.
title_en: Notice of Cancellation of Treasury Shares
translation_en_brief: TriIs Incorporated resolved at a board meeting held 2026-05-14 to cancel 200,000 treasury shares (2.19% of issued shares outstanding) pursuant to Article 178 of the Companies Act. The cancellation is scheduled to take effect 2026-05-28. Following the cancellation, issued shares will number 8,930,000, with treasury shares remaining at 289,368. The stated rationale is to improve capital efficiency and enhance shareholder returns.
